Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board MPESB ESB Pre Nursing Selection Test (PNST) 2026 Admissions Notification / Rulebook 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this MP PNST 2026 Examination can Apply Online from 09/06/2026  to 23/06/2026. Read the notification for admissions eligibility, post information, selection procedure, age limit, college list, seat details, and all other information.

Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) MP Pre Nursing Selection Test PNST Exam 2026 MP ESB PNST  Admissions 2026 :  Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 09/06/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 23/06/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 23/06/2026 Correction Date : 28/06/2026 Exam Date Start  : 10/07/2026 Admit Card Available : 03/07/2026 Answer Key Available : As per Schedule Result Declared : As per Schedule
Application Fee General / Other State : 460/- Reserve Category : 260/- Portal Fees : 60/- Include Pay the Examination Fee Through MP Online KIOSK Or Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Mode Only.
MP PNST / GNMTST Admission Test 2025 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2025 Minimum Age : 17 Years . Maximum Age : NA Age Relaxation Extra as per MP Pre Nursing Admission Test 2026 Rules.
MP Pre Nursing PNST Entrance Exam 2026: Admission Details
MP Pre Nursing Selection Test PNST 4 Years
10+2 Intermediate Exam with PCB and English as a Subject. More Eligibility Details Must Read the Notification.
MP ESB PNST Admissions 2026: District Details Bhopal, Indore, Jabalpur, Gwalior, Ratlam, Rewa, Sagar, Satna & Ujjain

How to Fill MP ESB PNST Admission Test Online Form 2026 Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board MPESB Are Released the Notification for MP Pre Nursing Selection Test PNST 2026 Candidate Can Apply Between 09/06/2026 to 23/06/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in MPPEB PNST Online Form 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online
